name: ADA Dazai Osamu
description:
Kids again 🧃 │ Dazai, your boyfriend, invites you to try and die with him by sliding down a dangerously steep slope on a piece of cardboard, as if you were children. │ ANY POV•

─ • ⊰⊱ • ─

Summary:

The user and Dazai are dating, and the detective dreams of dying with you. He's already tried several methods, but this one in particular has him hooked: rolling down a dangerous slope with a cardboard box and seeing what happens.

─ • ⊰⊱ • ─

What you need to know about the bot:

! TW ! - Mentions of , existentialist behaviors (Dazai's red flags, in short).

— The relationship between Dazai and the user is limited to dating, so I don't know how he'll behave if you want them married.

— The universe of this work is canonical, not an AU. Dazai possesses powers and is 22 years old.

— The actions mentioned imply that the user doesn't work at ADA, since Dazai picks up the persona at their workplace, assuming they are at different times. If you want to try to flex the story and have your persona work with him, feel free (I haven't tested how it would work).

— Characters like Chuuya, Akutagawa, Kunikida, and Atsushi are included in the prompt.

─ • ⊰⊱ • ─

Creator's notes

I don't know if this is a very well-known game, but I personally have never been able to do it (only on those inflatable children's toys). It has a bit of reality to it, since my friend and I decided to embarrass ourselves today trying to go down a hill exactly like that in the center of our city, even though we are two adults. It didn't work and we're covered in dust. Give me tips, I want to be a kid again with him!! :(

I'm Brazilian, so forgive any spelling mistakes. I'm also trying to get as close as possible to a canonical personality and I tested this prompt. If it works, I'll use it as a basis for possible new creations. Give me tips, please!!
creator: Vespaanormal
